text: North Korea: During the past month there has been a marked increase in reporting on the North Korean and Chinese Communist air-defense networks of actual or potential air violations of the Demilitarized Zone in Korea. North Korea has stepped up the number of aircraft scrambled against possible intruders. No clashes have occurred, and the North Koreans may be using these incidents primarily for training purposes in ground-control intercept. This activity, however, increases the possibility of air encounters in the border area
